---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path (long panel: one row per unit-period)
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_event_panel.csv")

  # Variables
  unit_var: "school_id"        # panel unit (fixed effect + clustering)
  time_var: "period"           # calendar period (fixed effect)
  event_time_var: "event_time" # time relative to treatment (…-2,-1,0,1,2…)
  treat_var: "treated"         # treated group flag (1/0, or "Treatment"/"Control")
  outcome_var: "test_score"    # numeric outcome

  # Reference (omitted) event time; its coefficient is pinned to 0.
  ref_period: -1

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Test Score"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Dynamic Impact: Event-Study Plot"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  x_label: ""
  y_label: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

if (!requireNamespace("fixest", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("The 'fixest' package is required for the event-study plot. ",
       "Run renv::restore() from the project root, then re-render.", call. = FALSE)
}
suppressMessages(library(fixest))   # attach so i() resolves inside the formula

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# ==============================================================================
# DATA SCRUBBING & PROCESSING BLOCK
# ==============================================================================
model_df <- raw_data %>%
  drop_na(all_of(c(params$unit_var, params$time_var, params$event_time_var,
                   params$treat_var, params$outcome_var))) %>%
  mutate(
    ev_unit  = as.factor(.data[[params$unit_var]]),
    ev_time  = as.factor(.data[[params$time_var]]),
    ev_et    = as.integer(round(cerp_numeric(.data[[params$event_time_var]],
                                             params$event_time_var))),
    ev_y     = cerp_numeric(.data[[params$outcome_var]], params$outcome_var),
    # Map a messy treatment flag to a strict 1/0 indicator
    ev_treat = if_else(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(.data[[params$treat_var]]))),
                 "^(1|treat|interven|yes|received|true|t)$|treat|interven"),
      1L, 0L)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(ev_et, ev_y)

if (!(params$ref_period %in% unique(model_df$ev_et))) {
  stop("ref_period = ", params$ref_period,
       " is not present in '", params$event_time_var, "'. Available event times: ",
       paste(sort(unique(model_df$ev_et)), collapse = ", "), call. = FALSE)
}

# Event-study DiD: relative-time dummies interacted with treatment, unit &
# period fixed effects, SEs clustered by unit. ref_period is omitted (= 0).
# NOTE: i()'s ref must be a plain scalar in scope — fixest's formula parser
# mis-reads an inline `params$ref_period` as two data variables.
ref_val <- as.integer(params$ref_period)
model <- fixest::feols(
  ev_y ~ i(ev_et, ev_treat, ref = ref_val) | ev_unit + ev_time,
  data = model_df, cluster = ~ev_unit
)

# Tidy the interaction coefficients into an event-time table. coeftable columns
# are positional (Estimate, Std. Error, ...) — referenced by index so a renamed
# header can't silently break the extraction.
ct <- as.data.frame(fixest::coeftable(model), check.names = FALSE)
plot_data <- tibble(
    term     = rownames(ct),
    Estimate = ct[[1]],
    SE       = ct[[2]]
  ) %>%
  mutate(EventTime = as.integer(str_extract(term, "(?<=::)-?\\d+"))) %>%
  drop_na(EventTime) %>%
  select(EventTime, Estimate, SE) %>%
  # Pin the reference period at exactly 0 (its coefficient is normalized out)
  bind_rows(tibble(EventTime = params$ref_period, Estimate = 0, SE = 0)) %>%
  arrange(EventTime) %>%
  mutate(
    Lower  = Estimate - 1.96 * SE,
    Upper  = Estimate + 1.96 * SE,
    IsRef  = EventTime == params$ref_period
  )
```


```{r plot-event-study}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = EventTime, y = Estimate)) +

  # Zero-effect anchor and the program-onset boundary (between -1 and 0)
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = cerp_cols[["text"]],
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, color = cerp_cols[["accent"]],
             linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7) +

  # Connect the point estimates, then draw CIs and points on top
  geom_line(color = cerp_cols[["neutral"]], linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = Lower, ymax = Upper, color = IsRef, shape = IsRef),
                  linewidth = 0.9, size = 0.7, fatten = 3.5) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = unname(cerp_cols["primary"]),
                                "TRUE"  = unname(cerp_cols["subtle"]))) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 16, "TRUE" = 21)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = plot_data$EventTime) +

  annotate("text", x = -0.5, y = Inf, label = "  Program start",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.4, family = cerp_font_caption, size = 3.2,
           color = cerp_cols[["accent"]]) +

  theme_cerp() +

  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  ) +

  labs(
    title = if (nzchar(params$chart_title)) params$chart_title else paste("Dynamic Impact on", params$metric_name),
    subtitle = if (nzchar(params$chart_subtitle)) params$chart_subtitle else paste0(
      "Estimated effect at each period relative to program start.\n",
      "Flat, near-zero points before the line support a credible comparison; ",
      "the period before start is fixed at 0."),
    x = if (nzchar(params$x_label)) params$x_label else "Periods relative to program start (0 = first treated period)",
    y = if (nzchar(params$y_label)) params$y_label else paste("Effect on", params$metric_name),
    caption = params$source_note
  )
```
